2026-07-13.focus: Back / rear delts / arms - overachieved red-readiness pull day

exercises.name: Treadmill Warm-up
exercises.agentNote: Warm-up walk before deciding if the red-readiness lift was still okay.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.agentNote: Actual: 30 kg then 40 kg x 2. Strong progression, but above the red-day cap.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Row
exercises.agentNote: Actual row was 40-60 lb; converted to kg effective machine load.

exercises.name: Face Pulls / Cable Rear Delt
exercises.agentNote: 30, 35, 40 kg ramp. Good posture stimulus, too much for a red cap.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curls
exercises.agentNote: 30-40 lb/hand; effective load shown as both dumbbells after lb->kg conversion.

exercises.name: Treadmill Warm-up
exercises.agentNote: Fever cleared, throat still a bit itchy. Completed as the warm-up: incline 10-13, speed 3-3.3.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.agentNote: Return cap after sick day. Two clean sets only; no third set chase.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.agentNote: Back off from the Jul 7 35 kg top sets. If 30 kg feels heavy, stay there and stop at 2 sets.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.agentNote: Swapped from Step-Ups mid-session. Reps are total steps split between both legs, not per-side reps.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.agentNote: Bodyweight only; skip if legs feel wobbly after step-ups.

2026-07-15.focus: Recovery - legs done Jul 14, easy day

exercises.name: Treadmill Warm-up
exercises.agentNote: If symptoms are still active, make this the whole session and skip lifting.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.agentNote: Return cap after sick day and Jul 13 pull overshot. Two clean sets only; no third set chase.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.agentNote: Back off from the Jul 7 35 kg top sets. If 30 kg feels heavy, stay there and stop at 2 sets.

exercises.name: Step-Ups
exercises.agentNote: 10 per side with about 10-12 lb/hand, or bodyweight if throat/head still feel off. Keep it cleaner and lower than Jul 7.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.agentNote: Bodyweight only; skip if legs feel wobbly after step-ups.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.agentNote: Chest stays prioritized, but this is not a PR day after illness. Stop if final reps grind.

exercises.name: Cable Fly
exercises.agentNote: Hyatt has no standalone pec deck, so use the Aerofit cable crossover. Closest prior fly was Jul 8 pec deck at 35 kg.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.agentNote: Optional third movement only if chest press and fly were easy. Low incline, not steep.

exercises.name: Face Pulls / Cable Rear Delt
exercises.agentNote: Posture insurance after chest; deliberately below the Jul 13 pull-day top set.

exercises.name: Zone 2 Treadmill
exercises.agentNote: No intervals this week unless throat, fever, and sleep are all clean. Keep it conversational.

exercises.name: Swim / Zone 2 Treadmill
exercises.agentNote: Enjoyment cardio only. Skip if symptoms linger or sleep debt is still obvious.
